meta.feed_title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

items.title: Messi scores as Inter Miami open new stadium with a draw in the MLS
items.summary: Miami captain scored his team's first goal after David Beckham said the Nu Stadium was a 'dream come true' for Miami.

items.title: Thousands rally in Iraq against ‘senseless’ US-Israel war on Iran
items.summary: Protesters chant against the US and Israel, urging the global community to confront their actions in the Middle East.

items.title: Trump seeks to end the war without it becoming ‘an abject failure’
items.summary: Barbara Slavin of the Stimson Center says Trump misread the situation in Iran and now scrambles for a way out.

items.title: Under Israeli restrictions, Palestinian Christians mark quiet Holy Week
items.summary: Israeli restrictions disrupt Jerusalem's Holy Week, leaving the Christian Quarter deserted and businesses shuttered.

items.title: Iran war: What is happening on day 37 of US-Israeli attacks?
items.summary: A US crew member who has been missing since Iran shot down a fighter jet has been rescued, President Donald Trump says.

items.title: Yemen’s Houthis claim cluster missile attack on Israel’s Ben Gurion airport
items.summary: Yemen’s Houthi military spokesman has claimed responsibility for a strike on Israel’s Ben Gurion airport in Jaffa.

items.title: ‘Miraculous’: US rescues second pilot downed in Iran, Trump confirms
items.summary: Iran claims another US aircraft involved in the rescue of the F-15 fighter pilot has been shot down.

items.title: Wilder edges retiring Chisora in chaotic heavyweight boxing fight
items.summary: Former WBC champion comes out on top in the closely contested fight against his British opponent in London.

items.title: ‘Nothing prepares you’: The invisible lives of carers in the UK
items.summary: Thrust into the isolated world of caring, a daughter learns how other sole carers cope, some under immense strain.

items.title: Trump’s unpopular war on Iran
items.summary: Most Americans oppose the US-Israel war on Iran. ​​No recent US war has ever started off being this unpopular.

items.title: Iran says Iraqi ships can pass Strait of Hormuz as transits tick up
items.summary: Tehran says Iraq will face no restrictions in waterway, praising country's 'struggle' against the US.

items.title: US satellite firm Planet Labs announces blackout on war on Iran images
items.summary: Company says move amid US-Israel war on Iran comes after a request from the US government.

items.title: Iran war live: Trump confirms rescue of US officer, says ‘we got him’
items.summary: Iran says US-Israeli attacks on the Mahshahr Petrochemical Zone have killed five and wounded 170.

items.title: Car slams into Louisiana Lao New Year parade, injuring about 15 people
items.summary: Authorities in New Iberia, Louisiana, have said the incident does not appear to be an intentional car-ramming.

items.title: Israeli measures tighten grip on Hebron’s Ibrahimi Mosque
items.summary: Hebron’s Ibrahimi Mosque sees intensified control, with Israeli measures resembling policies applied at Al-Aqsa Mosque.

items.title: Lewandowski claims late La Liga win for Barcelona at Atletico
items.summary: Barcelona move seven points clear of Real Madrid at the top of Spanish football's La Liga after beating Atletico 2-1.

items.title: Giuffre family urges UK’s King Charles to meet Epstein survivors in US
items.summary: Prior to her death, Virginia Giuffre accused Epstein of trafficking her to Charles's brother, the former Prince Andrew.

items.title: How will Pakistan deal with the fallout from Iran war?
items.summary: War in the Middle East is worsening economic crisis in Pakistan.

items.title: Indonesia receives bodies of peacekeepers killed in southern Lebanon
items.summary: Foreign Minister Sugiono told reporters that Indonesia wants a thorough UN investigation into the deaths.

items.title: Trump files emergency motion to continue building White House ballroom
items.summary: The motion argues that a ruling suspending the construction was 'improper' and left national security weaknesses.

items.title: Israeli police arrest antiwar protesters in Tel Aviv
items.summary: Israeli police clashed with protesters and made arrests in Tel Aviv as demonstrators rallied against the war on Iran.

items.title: Tehran psychiatric hospital not usable after US-Israeli strike
items.summary: A psychiatric hospital in Tehran is no longer functioning after a US-Israeli strike, the hospital chief says.

items.title: Universities hit as US, Israel ramp up attacks on Iran’s infrastructure
items.summary: Authorities say at least 30 universities impacted by US and Israeli strikes since the start of the war.

items.title: Iran’s coastline: architecture of control
items.summary: We take you on a walkthrough of Iran’s coastline and strategic islands marking its architecture of control.

items.title: Vehicle engulfed in flames after Israeli drone strike in central Gaza
items.summary: Palestinians in Gaza scrambled to extinguish a vehicle engulfed in flames after it was targeted by an Israeli drone.
